headlines.title: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
headlines.summary: The deals come as the DOD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, Nvidia ve yapay zeka cipleri tarafinda altyapi yarisinin hiz kesmeden devam ettigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: YZ altyapi yarisi sermaye akislarini, cip talebini ve platform kazananlarini belirler. Bu sinyal özellikle ai, anthropic ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Top 10 robotics stories of April 2026
headlines.summary: In April 2026, prominent robotics companies hit technical milestones, raised large funding rounds, and took part in patent disputes.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Visa, Mastercard cite travel slowdown impact
headlines.summary: While the war in Iran is depressing travel and hurting income, the card networks are leaning into stablecoins to drive future revenue growth.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, odeme aglari ve stablecoin tarafinda rekabetin sertlestigini ve finans altyapisinda yeni guc dengeleri olustugunu gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Odeme ve finans altyapisindaki degisim yeni kazananlari ve islem akisini yeniden kurar. Bu sinyal özellikle mastercard, stablecoin ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Teradyne Robotics revenue rises at the start of 2026
headlines.summary: Teradyne Robotics brought in $91 million in Q1 2026, with its AI products helping to boost robotics sales.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

political_items.title: Trump is raising tariffs on E.U.-made cars and trucks to 25%
political_items.summary: The president claimed the bloc had failed to comply with a trade agreement, a charge E.U. officials rejected
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

political_items.title: Spirit Airlines is preparing to shut down after a rescue deal collapsed
political_items.summary: A $500 million government lifeline that the budget carrier was counting on to stay in business has fallen through
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

political_items.title: US to cut troop levels in Germany by 5,000 amid Trump spat with Merz
political_items.summary: The decision to reduce the US deployment to Germany comes amid a row between the two allies over Iran.
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

political_items.title: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
political_items.summary: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

topic_router.reason: Robotik şirketleri, depo otomasyonu, humanoid gelişmeler ve sanayi kullanımlarını daha odaklı verir.

topic_router.label: YZ Modelleri
